stemHtml: When an INS loses its alignment reference during flight, the…

options.a: NAV mode is lost until the next alignment is carried out on the ground.
options.b: Pilot must select ALIGN on the mode selector unit and wait for about 10 minutes.
options.c: INS loses all functionality and should be switched off to save electrical power.
options.d: Pilot must select STBY on the mode selector unit and wait for about 3 minutes before switching to the ALIGN mode.
